brief: Build infrastructure + content for benchmarking LLM resistance to semantic-mirage bugs in Effect-TS/Quint/XState code. Outcome: detection skill + reference task set + reusable replay harness.
claudeGoalObjective: Land bundle A (G1+G2+G8) end-to-end: spot-semantic-mirage skill installed and verified, ≥3 SEMANTIC-MIRAGE-* reference tasks with seeded mirage bugs and behavioral tests passing on the reference impl + failing on each seeded bug, replay harness emitting structured replay.jsonl per run. All committed, pushed, AND a final $code-review on the diff with zero unresolved findings.

stories.title: Mirage taxonomy
stories.objective: Catalog ≥18 distinct semantic-mirage patterns (6 per library × 3 libs: Effect-TS, Quint, XState) with: name, plausible-but-wrong code, why-wrong, behavioral test that catches it. Live at docs/MIRAGE-TAXONOMY.md.

stories.title: spot-semantic-mirage skill
stories.objective: Author .claude/skills/spot-semantic-mirage/SKILL.md per agentskills.io format. Step-by-step library-aware detector. Pulls from taxonomy. Outputs ordered findings + counter-test prompt per finding.

stories.title: SEMANTIC-MIRAGE-* reference tasks
stories.objective: Create references/SEMANTIC-MIRAGE-1 (Effect), -2 (XState), -3 (Quint→TS). Each: spec.md, reference impl that passes all tests, K seeded-bug variants where each variant breaks ≥1 behavioral test. Wire into infra/manifest-schema.ts.

stories.title: Structured replay.jsonl harness
stories.objective: Modify infra/recorder.ts to also emit results/<run>/<task>/replay.jsonl with {turn, agentMsg, toolCall, fileDiff, testOutput, exitCode}. Zero behavior change on existing scoring.
evidenceRequired: replay.jsonl emitted on a sample run

stories.title: Pilot eval: vanilla vs vanilla+skill on G003 tasks
stories.objective: Run plain-ts agent and plain-ts+spot-semantic-mirage on the 3 new tasks. Record bug-detection-rate per cell. Commit results/ artifacts. Expect ≥30pp delta on mirage-detection rate; if <30pp document why.

stories.title: Quality gate: ai-slop-cleaner + verification + code-review
stories.objective: Run ai-slop-cleaner, oh-my-claudecode:verifier, and code-reviewer over the full bundle-A diff. Address all findings. Push final commit. Open PR or merge to main per repo norm.

selectionRationale: User flagged 'looks-right-but-wrong' bug class as the most interesting. Bundle A from ROADMAP-15-GOALS.md (G1+G2+G8) maps 1:1. Smallest cost (1 week). Stories ordered: taxonomy first (informs everything), then skill (uses taxonomy), then tasks (validate skill), then harness (lets us run pilot), then pilot, then gate.
